title: eleocharis subarticulata
intro: Eleocharis subarticulata, also known as Arctic Spike-rush, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues due to its anthelmintic, antibacterial, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis subarticulata include its ability to aid in the removal of parasites, reduce inflammation, and ease coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
